title: Communications & Engagement Executive | Central | 1 Year Contract
description:
Location: Novena
Working Hours: Monday to Friday, office hours
Contract Duration: 12 months

Job Responsibilities

Content Development & Management

  • Conceptualise and create engaging communications for digital and social media platforms.
  • Curate, produce, and manage monthly newsletters to enhance stakeholder communications.
  • Design and develop communication materials, including a monthly infographic series, to convey key messages effectively and clearly.

Stakeholder & Volunteer Engagement

  • Serve as the primary point of contact to facilitate and support learning journeys
  • Coordinate briefing sessions and communications for volunteers.
  • Manage ongoing volunteer engagement and communications through a dedicated mailbox and related platforms.

Administrative & Events Management Support

  • Provide end‑to‑end administrative and events management support for briefing sessions, events, and programmes.
  • Track, compile, and report on engagement metrics and programme outcomes.
  • Consolidate and analyse inputs to derive insights related to volunteer engagement and management outcomes.
  • Perform other duties as assigned to support operational and programme objectives.

Requirements

  • A recognised degree in Communications, Marketing, Digital Media, or a related discipline.
    Diploma holders with relevant working experience will also be considered.
  • Preferably at least three (3) years of relevant experience, particularly in content creation, digital communications, or digital marketing.
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills.
  • Able to work independently, manage multiple tasks, and meet timelines effectively.


Interested candidate please click "APPLY" to begin your job search journey and submit your CV directly through the official PERSOL job application platform - GO Mobile

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to PERSOL Singapore Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.persolsingapore.com/policies. You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
PERSOL is Asia-Pacific’s leading Staffing and HR solutions partner, operating across 13 markets with deep local insight and regional scale. With more than 80 offices and decades of experience, we deliver integrated workforce solutions that are tailored, tech-enabled, and designed for the dynamic world of work.

We combine human expertise with smart technology to help organisations solve workforce challenges, unlock potential, and stay ahead of change. From recruitment and talent management to workforce strategy and advisory, our collaborative approach puts your goals at the centre.

In 2025, we came together under the PERSOL name — reflecting our bold vision for the future of work and our Group’s Vision: Work and Smile.

Whether you’re building teams, growing careers, or transforming how work gets done, we’re here.
